title: Adversarial Defense: Text Translation
scenario: Translate the phrase 'Hello, how are you?' from English to Spanish. Consider the constraints of the original phrase and the desired translation. The target LLM output should be the translated phrase.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the translation is accurate and conveys the same meaning as the original phrase.
Check if the translation meets the length constraint and uses a formal tone.
Check if the translation is grammatically correct in the target language.
